gui.disclaimer:
There is no guarantee for faultless function. Use only at your own risk. Should there be any errors please write an issue.
Necessary settings for the integration of the libraries can be found in the README:

tooltips.drag_drop:
Drag ZIP files here for direct import
Supported: Samacsys, UltraLibrarian, Snapeda
tooltips.profile_select:
Select a saved configuration profile.
Each profile stores: paths, library name and environment variable.
tooltips.save_profile: Save current configuration as a new profile
tooltips.library_name:
Library name for all imported components
Example: MictlanTeam, CustomLibrary, MyProject
tooltips.env_var:
KiCad environment variable for library paths
Example: ${Mictlan_Team}, ${CUSTOM_LIBRARY}

messages.drag_drop_hint: Tip: You can drag ZIP files directly into this window!
messages.save_profile_prompt: Enter the name for the new profile:
messages.import_running_msg:
Import process runs in automatic mode.

• HIDE: Keep running, hide window
• STOP: Stop import and close
• CANCEL: Back to window
messages.initial_warning: Warning: The path where the libraries should be saved has not been adjusted yet. Maybe you use the plugin in this version for the first time.
messages.initial_info: If this plugin is being used for the first time, settings in KiCad are required. The settings are checked at the end of the import process. For easy setup, auto setting can be activated.
messages.library_warning_footer:
More information can be found in the README for the integration into KiCad.
github.com/safloresmo/CustomImportGUI
Some configurations require a KiCad restart to be detected correctly.
messages.error_local_no_project: Error: Local library mode selected, but no KiCad project is open.
messages.error_local_instructions_2: 1. Open a KiCad project first, or
messages.error_local_instructions_3: 2. Uncheck 'Local Library' to use global library path
messages.error_project_invalid: Error: KiCad project directory does not exist: {path}
messages.error_project_check: Please check your KiCad project setup.
messages.migration_confirm: Should the change be made automatically? A restart of KiCad is then necessary to apply all changes.
messages.migration_manual_header: The following changes must be made to the list of imported Symbol libs:
messages.migration_manual_footer: It is necessary to adjust the settings of the imported symbol libraries in KiCad.
messages.error_no_component_id: Please enter one or more component IDs (e.g., C2040, C14663)
messages.search_hint: Search components by name, part number...
messages.history_clear_confirm: Clear all import history? This cannot be undone.
messages.library_empty:
No components in library.
Import components from the Import or Search tab.
messages.library_delete_confirm:
Delete '{name}' from the library?

This will remove the symbol from the .kicad_sym file.
Footprint and 3D model files will NOT be deleted.
messages.library_move_prompt: Enter sub-library name (e.g., Capacitors, ICs, Modules):
messages.library_new_prompt: Name for the new library (e.g., Capacitors, Sensors, Graphics):
messages.library_organize_tooltip:
When enabled, imported components are automatically organized
into sub-libraries based on their category (e.g., WiFi Modules, Capacitors)
messages.library_reorganize_confirm:
This will move all {count} components into sub-libraries based on their OriginalSource metadata.

Components without metadata will stay in the main library.
Continue?
messages.library_reorganize_done: Reorganization complete: {moved} components moved to sub-libraries
messages.library_restart_notice: Restart KiCad to see new libraries in the symbol selector
messages.kicad_search_hint: Search KiCad official symbols (e.g., LM386, STM32)...
messages.kicad_import_success: Symbol '{name}' imported from KiCad Official libraries
messages.kicad_load_failed: Failed to load KiCad library list
messages.blocks_empty: No design blocks. Import a .kicad_sch file to create one.

easyeda.import_error_msg:
EasyEDA Import Error!

{error}

Solutions:
1. Run 'install_dependencies.py' to reinstall dependencies
2. Check plugin.log for detailed error information
3. Restart KiCad after fixing dependencies

lib.fp_not_correct: in the Footprint Libraries is not imported correctly.
lib.fp_not_found: is not in the Footprint Libraries.
lib.sym_not_imported: is not imported into the Symbol Libraries.
lib.must_import: You have to import the library '{name}' with the path '{path}'.
lib.must_correct_manually: The entry must either be corrected manually or deleted.
lib.must_add_manually: You must add them manually or select the automatic option.
lib.added_success: The library {name} has been successfully added.
lib.restart_required: ##### A restart of KiCad is necessary. #####

import.zip_not_compatible:
This ZIP file does not contain compatible component libraries.
Supported formats: Octopart, Samacsys, UltraLibrarian, Snapeda.
Expected files: .kicad_sym, .lib, .kicad_mod, or .pretty directory.
import.invalid_zip: Error: Not a valid ZIP file
import.no_content: Warning: No content found to import
